title: YourAcademicChoice
author: Anthony
description: A startup project built using React and ASP.NET. It is a mentorship platform that connects early university students with experienced peers for academic guidance and advice.

title: Portfolio Website
author: Anthony
description: Personal portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and experience.

title: Null Text Editor
author: Anthony
description: A custom-built text editor written in C++ using OpenGL that recreates a console-style interface from scratch, featuring its own file system, keyboard controls, and customizable UI.

title: Archive of Continuity
author: Anthony
description: An experimental infinite library application inspired by the Library of Babel, generating all possible text across infinite pages and character sets using a custom algorithm.
